headline: Humana Care Programs And Valuation Gap Draw Investor Attention
summary: Humana (NYSE:HUM) has partnered with Tuesday Health to expand value-based palliative care services for seriously ill members in Texas. The company released new study results on a remote, pharmacist-led inhaler education program for Medicare Advantage members with COPD, delivered via phone. The program was associated with substantial improvements in inhaler technique and COPD management outcomes for participating members. For investors, these moves come at a time when Humana's share price...
